title: Dylnc Pack V2
description:
a BETTER version of the Dylnc Pack
contains smooth deepslate, stone and much more...
body:
If you ever played with my previous texturepack called Dylnc Pack, you are in for a treat with this one..

**This pack contains the following:**

 * EVEN SMOOTHER STONE BLOCKS
 * SMOOTH DEEPSLATE BLOCKS
 * SPLASH XP BOTTLES
 * SHARPER EDGE ON THE NETHERITE SWORD


```
this pack does not affect the texture of ores.
neither does it alter the texture of the minecraft fire.
```

  
Please do give it a try!
